title: lasianthaea crocea
intro: Lasianthaea crocea, a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, is a flowering plant commonly known as the Yellow-Flowered Lasianthaea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain, fever, and inflammation, as well as treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Lasianthaea crocea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
